title: E2E Test Fixture
description: A fixture describing an end-to-end test case for tree-sitter-language-pack bindings.

id.description: Unique identifier for this fixture (used as test function name).

description.description: Human-readable description of what this test verifies.

language.description: The tree-sitter language name to load (omit for registry-level tests).

source_code.description: Source code snippet to parse (omit for non-parsing tests).

tree_not_null.description: Assert that the parse tree is not null.

root_child_count_min.description: Assert root node has at least this many children.

root_contains_node_type.description: Assert the root node contains a child of this type (recursive search).

expect_error.description: Assert that loading the language or parsing should produce an error.

has_error_nodes.description: Assert that the parse tree contains ERROR nodes.

languages_not_empty.description: Assert that available_languages() returns a non-empty list.

skip.description: Conditions under which this test should be skipped.

requires_language.description: Skip if this language is not available.
